extracted.aact_title: A Study to Learn How the Study Drug Elinzanetant (BAY 3427080) Affects the Way the Drug Dabigatran Moves Into, Through and Out of the Body in Healthy Male and Female Participants
aact_conditions: vasomotor symptoms as a sex hormone-dependent disorder in women and men
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Cmax of unconjugated and total dabigatran when given without or together with a single oral dose of elinzanetant

extracted.aact_title: A Study to Learn More About How the Study Treatment Elinzanetant (or BAY3427080) Moves Into, Through and Out of the Body, How Safe it is and How it Affects the Body After Taking Single and Multiple Doses in Healthy Women Aged 40 to 65 Years
aact_conditions: vasomotor symptoms as a sex hormone-dependent disorder in women and men
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Cmax: maximum observed drug concentration in measured matrix after single dose administration

extracted.aact_title: A Study to Learn More About How Well Elinzanetant Works and How Safe it is for the Treatment of Vasomotor Symptoms (Hot Flashes) That Are Caused by Hormonal Changes Over 52 Weeks in Women Who Have Been Through the Menopause
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Mean Change in Frequency of Moderate to Severe Hot Flashes (HFs) From Baseline to Week 12 (Assessed by Hot Flash Daily Diary [HFDD])

extracted.aact_title: A Study to Learn if Elinzanetant Affects the Ability to Drive and Brain Function in Healthy Women
aact_conditions: vasomotor symptoms as a sex hormone-dependent disorder in women and men
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Simulated driving performance as measured by SDLP using CRCDS-MiniSim

extracted.aact_title: A Study of BAY3427080 (NT-814) in the Treatment of Moderate to Severe Post-menopausal Vasomotor Symptoms
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Mean Change From Baseline in Mean Daily Frequency of Moderate and Severe Hot Flushes From Baseline to Week 4

extracted.aact_title: A Study to Learn More About How Much of the Study Treatment Elinzanetant (or BAY3427080) Gets Absorbed, How Safe it is and How it Affects the Body in Healthy Female and Male Participants
aact_conditions: vasomotor symptoms as a sex hormone-dependent disorder in women and men
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Area under the concentration versus time curve from zero to infinity of elinzanetant after single dose administration (AUC)

extracted.aact_title: A Study to Learn More About How Well Elinzanetant Works and How Safe it is Compared to Placebo for the Treatment of Hot Flashes Caused by Anti-cancer Therapy in Women With, or at High Risk for Developing Hormone-receptor Positive Breast Cancer
aact_conditions: vasomotor symptoms caused by adjuvant endocrine therapy in women with, or at high risk for developing hormone-receptor positive breast cancer
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Mean Change in Frequency of Moderate to Severe Hot Flashes (HF) From Baseline to Week 4 (Assessed by Hot Flash Daily Diary [HFDD])

extracted.aact_title: A Study to Learn How a Proton Pump Inhibitor Affects the Way Elinzanetant (BAY 3427080) Moves Into, Through and Out of the Body, and How Much of it Gets Absorbed by the Body When Taken as a Single and Small Radioactive Dose in Healthy Adults
aact_conditions: vasomotor symptoms as a sex hormone-dependent disorder in women and men
extracted.aact_primary_outcome_measure: Area under the concentration vs. time curve from zero to infinity after single (first) dose (AUC) of elinzanetant without concomitant administration of esomeprazole.
